SyncMyFonts
LAN font sync
System fonts excluded Only user-installed fonts are eligible for LAN sync.

Local-first sync

Sync

Move licensed, non-system fonts between trusted computers on this network.

0 warnings
This computer

This computer

macOS user font folders are eligible. System font folders stay excluded.

Sharing is off
Paired computer

No peer selected

Find a nearby SyncMyFonts app on the same LAN, or paste a LAN URL.

Start here on the computer with fonts

I have fonts to share

Turn on LAN sharing for this session. No port forwarding is required.

Start here on the computer missing fonts

I need fonts from another computer

Find a peer, review exactly what will be installed, then bring over only the missing fonts.

Recommended next step

Share or pair a computer

Use the left card if this computer already has the font. Use the right card if this computer needs the font.

System fonts Excluded from sync by policy

Sync policy

Only fonts you installed

SyncMyFonts should never copy operating system fonts from Windows or macOS system folders.

Current user font folders Managed app font folder No OS font folders

Nearby

LAN computers

No peers found yet Open SyncMyFonts on another computer and choose Share fonts on this network.

Pairing

No port forwarding

Local sync is designed for trusted LANs. A manual URL remains available when network discovery is blocked.

Platform behavior

macOS preview

Use this preview to keep copy and layout honest for macOS and Windows packaging.

macOS

Local sync first

Prefer same-LAN peer transfer before any external sync provider.

Exclude system fonts

Keep Windows and macOS system fonts out of every transfer.

Advanced diagnostics
